channel.title: DigestFlow Sample Feed
channel.description: Sample RSS feed for local DigestFlow testing.

item.title: AI automation reduces manual ops workload
item.description: Operations teams reduced repetitive manual tasks by 32 percent after introducing AI-assisted workflows for triage and reporting.

item.title: Research note shows faster review cycles
item.description: A research report found that teams using structured validation cut review cycles from five rounds to three in typical weekly content workflows.

item.title: New workflow release adds source citations
item.description: The latest workflow release introduced source-level citation blocks and clearer output formatting for analyst-ready summaries.

item.title: Teams improve reporting consistency
item.description: Early users reported more consistent weekly stakeholder updates after adopting a fixed digest and packaging pipeline.

item.title: Packaging stage highlights reusable hooks
item.description: Editors said reusable hooks and CTA variants reduced last-minute rewriting before manual LinkedIn publishing.
